displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Added texture to help babies learn to chew and mash
• Calcium for strong bones and teeth
• Iron for brain development

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Easy to Mix Directions:
1. Pour out 1/4 cup of cereal in bowl
2. For best results, stir in 1/4 cup liquid (breastmilk, infant formula, water or juice)
3. For a thinner texture, stir in 1/3 cup liquid
4. For toddler, mix with milk for children over 1 year of age
5. Serve as is or warm in the microwave
6. Always test temperature before feeding
7. Discard any unfed cereal
• Microwave Guidelines for Heating:
1. Warm unheated liquid at medium (50% power) 15-30 seconds
2. Mix heated liquid with cereal
3. Stir to even out temperature
4. Test temperature before feeding

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool, dry place

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
Whole Wheat Flour, Whole Grain Oat Flour, Sugar, Oat Flour, Rice Flour, Banana Flakes, Strawberry Flavored Bits (Cornstarch, Strawberry Puree, Strawberry Juice Concentrate), Dried Apples, Whole Grain Rye Flour, Pearled Barley Flour, Red Beet Juice Powder (Color), Natural Apple Flavor. Vitamins and Minerals: Calcium Carbonate, Potassium Phosphate, Magnesium Oxide, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid), Iron (Electrolytic), Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E (Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate), Niacinamide, Vitamin A Palmitate, Vitamin D3, Vitamin B1 (Thiamin Mononitrate), Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin), Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Vitamin B12, Folic Acid
• Contains: Wheat

product.name: Gerber Baby Rice Cereal - Banana & Strawberry

metaData.Ingredients:
Organic While Grain Oat Flour (Contains Wheat)
• Vitamins and Minerals: Calcium Carbonate, Choline Bitartrate, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Electrolytic Iron, Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E (Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate), Niacinamide, Riboflavin (Vitamin B2), Thiamin Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Vitamin B12, Folic Acid
• Contains soy
metaData.Key Information:
Gerber's Organic Oatmeal cereal is made with non GMO ingredients and is USDA certified organic with no artificial flavors, colors nor preservatives and consists of:
• Iron to help support cognitive and normal immune system development
• Calcium, vitamin C and 6B vitamins for overall growth and development
metaData.Preparation:
• Baby's First Cereal Feeding:
1. Mix 1 tablespoon cereal with 4 - 5 tablespoon of warmed breastmilk or infant formula
2. You may increase the amount of cereal used gradually
• Easy to Mix Directions:
Pour desired amount of cereal in bowl
• For Baby:
1. Stir in liquid (breastmilk or infant formula) to desired consistency
2. Serve as it is or warm
• For Toddler:
1. Mix with milk, water, or Gerber juice for children over 1 year of age
2. Serve as it is or warm
• Microwave Guidelines for Heating:
1. Mix 1/4 cup of cereal with 1/3 - 1/4 cup unheated liquid
2. Warm at medium (50% power) 15 - 30 seconds
3. Stir to even out temperature
• Important:
1.Test Temperature before feeding
2. If mixing with milk for children over 1 year, heat on high power for 15 - 20 seconds
3. Discard any unfed cereal
metaData.Storage Information:
• Directions:
Store in a cool, dry place
• Use within 30 days after opening
• Keep package away from children
• Important:
Do not use if Nutrilock(r) seal is damaged

product.description: Gerber Graduates Puffs comes in delightful flavours such as strawberry apple, blueberry, banana and peach.

• Vitamins and Minerals: Iron (Electrolytic), Vitamin E (Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate), Niacinamide (Vitamins A and B), Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Vitamin B1 (Thiamine Hydrochloride)

metaData.Key Information:
Please note that due to varying stock availability, the packaging of the product you receive may differ from what is displayed on our website.

• For ages 8 months and above
• A nutritious and light airy snack made from wholegrain
• Contains vitamins and minerals including iron, vitamin E and B
• Designed to meet the development needs of the child
• Melts in baby's mouth for easy digestion and helps to encourage self-feeding
• With fun shape and right size, makes puffs a perfect choice for first finger food

metaData.SAP Product Name: GERBER GRADUATES BABY PUFFS - STRAWBERRY APPLE  42G

product.name: Gerber Graduates Baby Puffs - Strawberry Apple

product.description: When your baby is ready for more variety, try the Gerber Organic Oatmeal Banana Cereal (6+ months). Made with whole grains and real banana, it has iron to help support your baby’s cognitive development and natural defences. Fortified with Calcium, Vitamins C and 6 B Vitamins for overall growth & development, Gerber delivers high quality infant cereals that ensure your baby meets his essential nutrition and are trusted by moms all over the world.

metaData.Ingredients:
Organic Whole Grain Oat Flour (Contains Wheat), Organic Banana Flakes, Calcium Carbonate, Choline Bitartrate, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid), Iron (Electrolytic), Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E (Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate), Niacinamide, Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin), Vitamin B1 (Thiamine Mononitrate), Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Folic Acid, Vitamin B12.
CONTAINS: WHEAT
metaData.Key Information:
• USDA Certified Organic and non-GMO

• Made with whole grains and real fruit (banana)

• No artificial flavours, colours or preservatives

• Fortified with Iron, Zinc, Calcium, Vitamin C, Vitamin E and six B Vitamins to support growth & development
metaData.Preparation:
Easy-to-Mix Directions:

Pour or spoon desired amount of cereal in bowl.

For Baby: Stir in liquid (breastmilk or infant formula) to desired consistency.

For Toddler: Mix with milk, water, or Gerber Juice for children over one year of age.

Serve as-is or warm and discard any unfed cereal.

Microwave Guidelines for Heating:

Warm unheated liquid at MEDIUM (50% power) for 15 to 30 SECONDS.

Mix heated liquid with cereal.

Stir to even out temperature.

TEST TEMPERATURE before feeding.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool, dry place. Use within 30 days of opening.

product.description: Apple Monkey Organic Rice Cracker are a melt-able, baked snack for your little yum seekers! Serving your baby an Apple Monkey Organic Rice Cracker will not only help develop a healthy taste for a variety of flavours, but will also provide a wide range of nutrients. All Apple Monkey Organic Rice Crackers are perfect for on-the-go snacking!

metaData.Key Information: Apple Monkey Organic Rice Cracker are a meltable, baked snack for your little yum seekers! Serving your baby an Apple Monkey Organic Rice Cracker will not only help develop a healthy taste for a variety of flavours, but will also provide a wide range of nutrients such as omega 3 and DHA. This product also does not contain preservatives nor MSG and is free from diary, nuts, egg and gluten. All Apple Monkey Organic Rice Crackers are perfect for on-the-go snacking!

metaData.Preparation:
• To Prepare:
1. Pour 150ml of lukewarm water into baby's bowl
2. Add 50g or 5 tablespoons of Nestle Cerelac
3. Stir until the cereal is smooth and feed with clean spoon
• Important:
1. Wash hands before preparing baby's food
2. Make sure all utensils are thoroughly clean, just before preparing the cereal
3. Do not keep unfinished portion
4. Contains viable bacteria, follow storage instructions
5. Not intended for bottlefeeding

product.name: Nestle Cerelac Cereal - Rice & Mixed Fruits (6 Months)

product.description: We know the farmers that grow the ingredients specially for baby which is why we carefully select the ingredients that meet strict requirements on food safety norms, and we perform up to 100 controls and checks along the entire process to guarantee safety and quality of the baby food products. The Health Promotion Board Recommended Daily Allowance (RDA) for iron is 7mg for a 7 - s12 months old baby and 1 serving of Cerelac (50g of cereal powder + 150ml of warm water) provides 5mg of iron.

metaData.Ingredients:
Rice, Soya Bean, Sugar, Maltodextrin, Mixed Vegetables Flakes (Glucose Syrup, Corn Starch, Spinach, Pumpkin, Sugar, Carrot, Lecithin), Vegetable Oils (Palm Olein, Rapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Sunflower Oil), Skimmed Milk Powder (Cow's Milk), Soya Lectithin, Minerals (Calcium Carbonate, Sodium Phosphate, Ferrous Fumerate, Zinc Sulphate, Potassium Iodide), Vitamins (C, E, Niacin, Calcium Pantothenate, B2, B1, B6, A, D3, Folic Acid, B12, Biotin), Fish Oil Powder, Taurine, Vanillin, Bifidobacterium Lactis Culture
• Contains emulsifier (Soya lecithin) as permitted food conditioner
• Contains permitted flavouring
• All additives are of plant or synthetic origin
• May contain traces: Gluten
metaData.Key Information:
• Introduces the delicious taste of apples, bananas and oranges
• Made with baby grade ingredients
• With Bifdus BL probiotics that helps to fight against harmful bacteria to maintain a healthy digestive system
• Contains DHA which is an important building block for brain and eye development
• No added preservatives

product.name: Nestle Cerelac Cereal - Rice & Mixed Vegetables (6 Months)

product.description: We carefully select the ingredients that meet strict requirements on food safety norms, and we perform up to 100 controls and checks along the entire process to guarantee safety and quality of the baby food products. We naturally prepare our baby food with no added preservatives to help support baby’s growth and development, this means just pure goodness. Cereal Hydrolyzed Enzymatically (CHE) is a unique Nestle process which uses enzymes to break down complex carbohydrates into smaller units to allow easier digestion and better absorption of nutrients, and a smooth texture for easy mixing during preparation. Health Promotion Board Recommended Daily Allowance (RDA) for iron is 7mg for a 7-12 months old baby as 1 serving of Cerelac (50g of cereal powder +150ml of warm water) provides 5mg of iron.​

metaData.Ingredients:
Rice (75%), Corn Flour, Minerals (Calcium Carbonate, Potassium Phosphate, Ferrous Fumarate, Potassium Iodide), Vitamins (C, E, Niacin, Calcium Pantothenate, B1, B6, B2, A, Folic Acid, D3, B12), Docosahexaenoic Acid (Fish Oil, contain Milk Protein), Probiotic Cultures Bifidobacterium Lactis, Vanillin
• Contains permitted flavouring
• Food additives are of plant or synthetic origin
• May contain: Traces of milk, soya and gluten
metaData.Key Information:
Cerelac Rice Cereal is an ideal first solid food for your baby up from 6 months. It is made from rice and cereal grains which rarely causes allergies. Let your baby enjoy it with breastmilk or follow-up formula!Product features:• BIFIDUS BL probiotics
CERELAC is the first and only infant cereals with BIFIDUS BL probiotics – helps to fight against harmful bacteria, thereby maintaining a healthy digestive system.• DHA
An important building block for brain and eye development (for children up to 3 years of age).• Iron
Each serving contains more than 50% of daily iron intake - an important component of red blood cells which carry oxygen to all parts of the body to help the body’s production of energy.• Vitamin C
Helps your baby’s body to absorb iron from food.• Made with Baby Grade ingredients, nutrition and quality
The ingredients selected meets strict requirements on food safety. Up to 100 controls & checks are performed along the entire process to guarantee safety & quality of the baby food products.• No added preservatives • Cereal Hydrolyzed Enzymatically (CHE) Advantage
CHE is a unique NESTLE process which uses enzymes to break down complex carbohydrates into smaller units to allow easier digestion & better absorption of nutrients as well as smooth texture for easy mixing during preparation. It also enhances the taste of the cereal.

metaData.Preparation:
1. Wash your hands before preparing baby's food
2. Make sure all utensils are thoroughly clean, just before preparing the cereal
3. Pour 200ml milk into baby's bowl
4. Add 20g or 4 tablespoons of Nestle Cerelac
5. Stir until the cereal is smooth and feed using a clean spoon
metaData.Storage Information:
• Do not keep unfinished portion
• Close the pack tightly after each use and store it in a cool dry place

metaData.Ingredients: Brown Jasmine Rice, Corn Flour, Rice Bran Oil, Strawberry Powder
metaData.Key Information:
• All Natural
• No added sugar, salt or preservatives
• Suitable for babies 9 months+
• Comes in a resealable pack, the perfect on-the-go snack for your little one!
metaData.Preparation: For babies who just started solids, mix puffs with milk to make it softer. Also great to serve as a healthy snack or breakfast for toddlers, kids and even adults.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a dry place at room temperature. Once opened, reseal tightly and use within 7 days for maximum freshness.

product.name: Little Blossom Organic Brown Rice Puffs - Strawberry

product.description: We carefully select the ingredients that meet strict requirements on food safety norms, and we perform up to 100 controls and checks along the entire process to guarantee safety and quality of the baby food products. We naturally prepare our baby food with no added preservatives to help support baby’s growth and development, this means just pure goodness. Cereal Hydrolyzed Enzymatically (CHE) is a unique Nestle process which uses enzymes to break down complex carbohydrates into smaller units to allow easier digestion and better absorption of nutrients, and a smooth texture for easy mixing during preparation. Health Promotion Board Recommended Daily Allowance (RDA) for iron is 7mg for a 7-12 months old baby as 1 serving of Cerelac (50g of cereal powder + 150ml of warm water) provides 5mg of iron.

metaData.Ingredients:
Skimmed Milk Powder (Cow's Milk), Red Rice, Sugar Vegetable oils (Palm OLein, Rapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Sunflower Oil) Maltodextrin, Minerals (Calcium Carbonate, Sodium Phosphate, Ferrous Fumarate, Zinc Sulphate, Potassium Iodide), Fish Oil Powder, Vitamins (C, E, Niacin, Calcium Pantothenate, B1, A, B6, B2, Folic Acid, D3, Biotin, B12) Corn Starch Taurine Vanilla, Bifidobacterium Lactis Culture
• All additives are of plant or synthetic origin
• May contain traces: Soya, gluten
metaData.Key Information: Cerelac is the first and only infant cereals with BIFIDUS BL probiotics which helps to fight against harmful bacteria, thereby maintaining a healthy digestive system. DHA, iron and vitamin C are important building block for brain and eye development for children up to 3 years of age. Each bowl meets more than 50% of baby’s daily iron intake. Iron is an important component of red blood cells which carry oxygen to all parts of the body to help the body’s production of energy. Nestle Cerelac is made with baby grade ingredients that are grown specially for babies.

• Directions:
1. Wash your hands before preparing baby's food
2. Pour 150ml lukewarm water into baby's bowl
3. Add 50 grams or 5 tablespoons of Nestle Ceralac Infant Cereal
4. Stir until the cereal is smooth and feed using a clean spoon
• Important:
Make sure all utensils are thoroughly clean, just before preparing the cereal
